visa_types.name: Other
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance) 
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR ADOPTION VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5crbFcmL1v4on2oVI9Xz9p/3c3919dec0328c21e98fa8b731d8e3d9/Documentation-required-for-adoption-visa-new.pdf)

visa_types.visa_fees:
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6HBIQUUjsr8ZVUkFpOAKmY/fe0fffda012feea0b8e3045a901f6f04/visa-fees-others.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable
visa_types.processing_time: Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## VISA FEES
Please Note: There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6HBIQUUjsr8ZVUkFpOAKmY/fe0fffda012feea0b8e3045a901f6f04/visa-fees-others.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance) 
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR ADOPTION VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5crbFcmL1v4on2oVI9Xz9p/3c3919dec0328c21e98fa8b731d8e3d9/Documentation-required-for-adoption-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR BUSINESS VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7t3NmDGznsyipPBdLFuu50/49b8c9d2d251352fe22b4d2bf53dd731/Documentation-required-for-business-visas-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CITIZENSHIP/RESIDENCE PROGRAMMES (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2aeuO6mWzdIn5RquqvVvez/c39582756db5a4703e1067247c2721eb/Documentation-required-for-citizenship-residence-programmes-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR COURT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4bAGqx2GUFHrJDtThN7aSs/53fb934f9bb6381de2b6c8d27272948a/Documentation-required-for-court-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CULTURAL VISIT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/75y5RAytmH0SP8hHt4Hr9Q/7c486f518c411c71f1a94cff7a7ca6e7/Documentation-required-for-cultural-visit-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT ACTIVITIES VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79LENP0idVJSOPK1QYZ7In/564a3eb00595afaeff45e98411b3fec3/Document-required-for-Sport-Activites-Visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT TRIALS VISA  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3VDvMIN89Xg50N6wcmCQX4/0c3f64f7dda81a85a5c6e34dd6458570/DOCUMENTATION_REQUIRED_FOR_SPORT_TRIALS_VISA.pdf)
List of Required Documents - Spouses and Children Related to an EU (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/IlWI8FNxLQnAX8089QfT1/37c374e9525dab52507fa3059471660f/list-of-required-documents-spouses.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LONG TERM NON-TOURISM (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Ig9pPSYeF49AMhvNQxaRX/34a07b9897d9d8fdba174445104d953e/Documentation-required-for-long-term-non-tourism-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR TRAINING VISIT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/HjsqgnRErY88o6XMqXOpo/fc2c308b2f57c03a8530a433f0ba9e22/Documentation-required-for-training-visit-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR HUMANITARIAN VISA

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR MEDICAL VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bUUcOUgosbyJGRrL851jA/53fae7db53083bb0aa17851999bb420a/Documentation-required-for-medical-visas-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR OFFICIAL/POLITICAL VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/27pKxRNS3PhWJHE7nxE7Kl/ce574c4fc1dfb85e03da754529475d79/Documentation-required-for-offical-political-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR RELIGIOUS VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gKWxFAJ67GSD78Bziy624/402db164bc029f4356c6dfbbc26abb07/Documentation-required-for-religious-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/53c0Jq71zJMTZHEL4M3Sfc/e49d0e24f63b1c96fbcdeac8e69178ff/Documentation-required-for-scientific-research-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR DIPLOMATIC VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/QRiroJaYLkZL0JKcP9qR4/abd1b6b153c2898c9c005fdf6d42f1bc/Documentation-required-for-diplomatic-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LOST DOCUMENTS TO RE-ENTER MALTA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mDyxvZlfHRAxM9lfRAq4d/1295c9acadcf94f82edd51143b0f76ac/Documentation-required-Lost-Documents-to-re-enter-Malta-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SEASONAL WORKERS  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/OQRiU5eUteBCJ4NiE1HAi/34444422d78db0f68339ae1abf77778a/Documentation-required-for-seasonal-workers.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR - Working Holiday Visa  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2qMuFROgi8hMkz2Jv1WKHD/85eee0aba2673c20001328167ceecf96/List-of-Requirements-Working-Holiday-Visa-MES.pdf)

Declaration of proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2vYsQJ56ecOy3Bprf2vSuv/30c8b807aee5a4e411925a2e1c72dcd8/declaration-of-proof.pdf) 

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further
                                                                        processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JchqkhI2kg23TngHV3gkc/299f828401993ae76963223b39231a62/photo_160226.pdf) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
Declaration of Proof Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tJh5TEjz768DFAMSNAizd/32ab2e9cfd95f35639f3d30af1002fad/Declaration_of_Proof_Form_160226.pdf) 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Click here for the Visa application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6lVBWG1ykAZ1okQXKCAwdI/3c39c454b8983e98b9f00dd5a8d969b8/Long-Stay-D-VISA-Application-Form.pdf)

visa_types.name: Family reunification
visa_types.documents_required:
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Click here for the detailed checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/418d9a31b9a6bb215d713edefcec99ba/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)
Documents required for Family Reunification applications as advised by Central Visa Unit at Identita, Malta
Family reunification certificate issued by Identita/DCEA 
Bank Statement 
Full Passport Copy 
Original marriage certificate legalized in the country of origin. 
Original birth certificate legalized in the country of origin. 
Letter of invitation from the spouse in Malta, legalized/notarized by a notary or a lawyer in Malta. 
Copy of the passport of the spouse in Malta Copy of the passport of the spouse/children in the country of origin.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Family reunification]

- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of 150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate
- VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services -
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central visa unit, Identita, Malta.
visa_types.processing_time: Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunion certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family reunification certificate.
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunion certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family reunification certificate.
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.

## VISA FEES

[Table:Family reunification]

- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of 150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate
- VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services -
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central visa unit, Identita, Malta.

## Documents Required
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for a family Reunification visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identità. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Click here for the detailed checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/418d9a31b9a6bb215d713edefcec99ba/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)
Documents required for Family Reunification applications as advised by Central Visa Unit at Identita, Malta
Family reunification certificate issued by Identita/DCEA 
Bank Statement 
Full Passport Copy 
Original marriage certificate legalized in the country of origin. 
Original birth certificate legalized in the country of origin. 
Letter of invitation from the spouse in Malta, legalized/notarized by a notary or a lawyer in Malta. 
Copy of the passport of the spouse in Malta Copy of the passport of the spouse/children in the country of origin.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further
                                                                        processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JchqkhI2kg23TngHV3gkc/299f828401993ae76963223b39231a62/photo_160226.pdf) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms

Declaration of Proof Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tJh5TEjz768DFAMSNAizd/32ab2e9cfd95f35639f3d30af1002fad/Declaration_of_Proof_Form_160226.pdf) 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Click here for the Visa application form

visa_types.name: Employment visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Click here for the Checklist
- *The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. The said AIP shall remain valid until the date of the appointment booking and shall be presented at the Visa Application Centre (VAC) offered by VFS. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months)
- Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
- Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
- Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
If you have not purchased,Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance). .
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Employment visa]

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of 150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate, at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay at the application center @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services available at the application center - 
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
*Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central Visa unit, Identita, Malta

Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. visa_types.overview:
Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta. 
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta. 
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.

## VISA FEES

[Table:Employment visa]

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of 150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate, at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay at the application center @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services available at the application center - 
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
*Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the Central Visa unit, Identita, Malta 

## Documents Required
- Click here for the Checklist
- *The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. The said AIP shall remain valid until the date of the appointment booking and shall be presented at the Visa Application Centre (VAC) offered by VFS. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months)
- Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
- Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
- Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
If you have not purchased,Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance). .

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ZsXt7Khg4aBRaiUymKsys/e03793090a6dcdef3b030da0b785c1dc/photo_specification_160226.pdf)
Declaration of Proof Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tJh5TEjz768DFAMSNAizd/0e00c1c28cb7bb072ecd2cd655f0fbe3/Declaration_of_Proof_Form_160226.pdf)

Declaration of Documents 

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JchqkhI2kg23TngHV3gkc/299f828401993ae76963223b39231a62/photo_160226.pdf) 

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Click here for the Visa application form

visa_types.name: Study
visa_types.documents_required:
- Click here for the checklist for Student Visa
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa.
- Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
- Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
- Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance).
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Study]
Please note that your appointment for Student visa must be booked by the Educational Institution you are applying with. Please get intouch with your respective point of contact at the Education Institute to proceed.

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of  150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate
- VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services - 
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the The central visa unit, Identity Malta Agency .

Overview

Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience. 
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that your appointment for Student visa must be booked by the Educational Institution you are applying with. Please get intouch with your respective point of contact at the Education Institute to proceed.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience. 
Important Note: Incomplete application will not be accepted over the counter.

## VISA FEES

[Table:Study]
Please note that your appointment for Student visa must be booked by the Educational Institution you are applying with. Please get intouch with your respective point of contact at the Education Institute to proceed.

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of  150 for Extended service and 100 euro for Standard service equivalent in Local currency as per the current exchange rate
- VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay @INR 13500/-
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
Optional Value-added services - 
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 650/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 120/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3200/-.
- Optional Courier Assurance service is available at INR 200/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 2600/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the The central visa unit, Identity Malta Agency .

## Documents Required
- Click here for the checklist for Student Visa
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa.
- Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
- Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
- Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance).

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). 

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.

## Processing Time
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time.  Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa)  or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)
